name: Alert Agent
description: Create a paid alert bot for Telegram, Discord, webhooks, email, or dashboards.
degenPitch: Paid alerts with a receipt trail.
whatItDoes: Monitors prices, wallets, markets, launches, websites, or data conditions.
Uses webhooks and receipts to prove access.
cursorPrompt: Create a paid Telegram or Discord alert agent using DNA x402. Gate premium alerts behind signed receipts, verify webhooks, show the fee waterfall, and keep bot tokens in local env only.
suggestedPrompt: Create a paid Telegram or Discord alert agent using DNA x402. Gate premium alerts behind signed receipts, verify webhooks, show the fee waterfall, and keep bot tokens in local env only.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt verifies subscription or per-alert payment.
Paid retry avoids duplicate charge for the same alert payload.
